attributes: 1985 West Germany • Eva-Maria Reick Design • Ltd. Ed. #468/5000 • Vinyl & Cloth
condition_notes: New old stock — doll is still in its original plastic, unplayed and pristine. Includes signed Certificate of Authenticity (No. 468 of 5000, dated 1985) and Kanekalon hair-care booklet. Box note: the display box's clear window has separated from the box at one corner; otherwise light box/shelf wear (not factory-sealed/mint box).

measurements_in.note: Boxed/package dimensions; longest side 26 in exceeds the 24 in oversize threshold (dimensional-weight / large-package surcharge applies).

buyer_questions.q: What color are the doll's eyes?
buyer_questions.posted_to: Recorded in GitHub page + Square + Facebook descriptions. eBay has no public Q&A section (0 messages); eBay eye-color wording handled by owner.

square.note: 2026-06-19: description updated with brown eyes + 26x12x7 oversize note (sparse update, price/variation unchanged); added eye-macro image KLC3EPPLP5DMIF225FT3YJOS (non-primary).

ebay.note: Buy It Now + Best Offer; calculated ship + international; 7 photos incl COA. Dolls category, Condition New (sealed NOS), Type Artist Doll, Brand Gustel Wied, Artist Eva-Maria Reick, Country Germany. Custom label RG-0009. 2026-06-19: package dims 26x12x7, 3 lb, irregular-package flag ON (already set by owner — drives oversize shipping). marketplace.note: 2026-06-19: description updated — 'warm brown eyes' added to features + boxed-size 26x12x7 oversize bullet; added 2 photos (eye macro + full front in box).

shipping.packaging: Box around the doll's display box, padded
shipping.notes: Tall doll box; 26 in length exceeds the 24 in oversize threshold — expect dimensional-weight / large-package surcharge. eBay package set to 26x12x7 in, 3 lb, irregular-package flag on. Protect the sealed window.
